cards.back: A scheduling algorithm that executes the processes in the order they arrive at the CPU.
A scheduling algorithm that executes the process with the shortest remaining job first.
A scheduling algorithm that assigns equal time slots to each process and switches between them at regular intervals.
A scheduling algorithm that allows a higher-priority process to inherit the time slot of a lower-priority process if the higher-priority process is waiting for a resource.
A portion of code that accesses shared resources in a multi-threaded program, which must be protected to prevent conflicts between threads.
